title: Create sync-hr-current-snapshot.ts script
description: Create CLI script to sync hr_employee_current_snapshot from db_ptrj.HR_EMPLOYEE with ROW_NUMBER() ranking

files.change: Create script to refresh HR current snapshot table

implementation: Create TypeScript script with proper imports from lib/db.ts
Connect to db_ptrj.HR_EMPLOYEE using linked server or direct connection
Execute ROW_NUMBER() query partitioned by NIK
Handle errors gracefully with proper exit codes

criteria: Script compiles without errors: npx tsc src/scripts/sync-hr-current-snapshot.ts
Script runs and updates snapshot table
Output shows row count of updated/inserted records
NIK 1906041207910002 maps to A0966 after sync

interfaces.name: HREmployeeRow
interfaces.definition: { nik: string, empCode: string, empName: string, locCode: string, hrStatus: string, updateDate: Date, createDate: Date }

interfaces.name: SnapshotRow
interfaces.definition: { nik: string, currentEmpCode: string, currentEmpName: string, currentLocCode: string, currentHrStatus: string, activeCount: number, totalRowCount: number, isAmbiguous: boolean }

functions.purpose: Fetch all employee rows from db_ptrj.HR_EMPLOYEE
Compute ROW_NUMBER() ranking and filter current=1

functions.signature: async function syncSnapshot(snapshots: SnapshotRow[]): Promise<{ inserted: number, updated: number }>

manual_checks: Verify output row counts match expected
success_metrics: Script completes in < 5 minutes for 5000 employees
All NIKs with Status='1' have is_current=1
